hook.text: Kilimanjaro stands 5,895 meters tall on the Tanzanian plains—a volcano capped in ice.

buildup.text: It's the tallest freestanding mountain on Earth, rising from flat savanna.

discovery.text: You can walk from tropical forest to Arctic ice in a single climb up its slopes.

twist.text: Its glaciers have shrunk 80% since 1912 and may vanish completely within decades.

climax.text: Hemingway's 'The Snows of Kilimanjaro' captured a mountain that may soon have no snow.

punchline.text: Africa's icy crown is melting away.

quiz.question: What makes Kilimanjaro unique among tall mountains?
options: It is the tallest freestanding mountain
It is the oldest mountain on Earth
It is the only peak in Africa
